cards.name: Grovewarden Stag
cards.text: Rampage. When {name} enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: "The old forest does not fear the dark. It simply grows through it."
cards.art_prompt: majestic elk guardian spirit with glowing branching antlers, moonlit ancient forest clearing, mist between colossal trees

cards.name: Sylvaris Sproutling
cards.text: When {name} dies, gain 1 Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: Every ending in Sylvaris is a seed.
cards.art_prompt: tiny cute forest sprite made of leaves and glowing sap, sitting on a giant mushroom, dappled green light

cards.name: Verdant Surge
cards.text: Search your deck for a Wellspring, put it into the Arena exerted. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The land answers those who listen.
cards.art_prompt: burst of magical green energy erupting from forest soil, roots and flowers growing in fast motion, luminous spores

cards.name: Emberfang Raptor
cards.text: Rush. Whenever {name} attacks, it deals 1 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: "It hunts where the ash still glows."
cards.art_prompt: fierce raptor-like lizard beast with ember-orange scales and flame crest, volcanic badlands at dusk, glowing lava cracks

cards.name: Cinder Bolt
cards.art_prompt: crackling bolt of orange fire streaking across dark volcanic sky, sparks and embers trailing

cards.name: Abyssal Tidewyrm
cards.text: This spell can't be countered. Aegis 2. When {name} enters, return target Unit an opponent controls to its owner's hand.
cards.art_prompt: colossal sea serpent leviathan with glowing cyan fins breaching from stormy ocean waves, arcane light beneath the water

cards.name: Tidecaller's Rebuke
cards.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays 3. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: "Every tide returns what the shore tried to keep."
cards.art_prompt: arcane circle of glowing water runes suspended above dark ocean, wave curling around dissolving magical energy

cards.name: Aurelian Shieldmaiden
cards.text: Alert. When {name} enters, restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: Dawn holds the line so others may see it.
cards.art_prompt: female knight in ivory and gold armor holding radiant tower shield, sunrise light over marble fortress walls, banners

cards.name: Nyxhollow Reaper
cards.text: Venom, Dread. When {name} enters, target opponent discards a card.
cards.art_prompt: spectral wraith with tattered violet shroud and pale glowing scythe, thorned shadow tendrils, misty moonlit hollow

cards.name: Verdant Wellspring
cards.art_prompt: ancient stone basin overflowing with luminous green aether energy, forest roots embracing it, fireflies
